packet.revision_reason: turn a public benchmark result into a bounded evidence memory packet

retrieval_context.retrieval_question: Can evidence packets preserve benchmark limitations before hypothesis generation?

claim.plain_language_summary: A benchmark can support evidence organization only when limitations remain attached.
claim.operational_form: A packet is acceptable when every evidence item includes limitations and the allowed inference level is bounded.

boundary_decision.reason: public safe packet with bounded inference and explicit limitations

packet.falsification_route: Fails if downstream modules turn this packet into diagnosis, treatment, or unbounded claims.
packet.next_executable_action: Run the validator and confirm this packet is accepted to memory.

packet.revision_reason: test whether speculative evidence is blocked from becoming a strong claim

retrieval_context.retrieval_question: Can the boundary checker stop speculative sources from becoming strong discovery claims?

claim.plain_language_summary: A speculative paper proves a general cure discovery method works.
claim.operational_form: A weak source is incorrectly promoted to a strong generalized claim.

boundary_decision.reason: speculative weak evidence cannot be promoted to a strong generalized claim

packet.falsification_route: Fails if the validator accepts this packet directly to memory without review.
packet.next_executable_action: Run the validator and confirm this packet is rejected as an overclaim.

packet.revision_reason: test whether private or sensitive material is blocked from discovery memory

retrieval_context.retrieval_question: Can private material be prevented from entering public-safe research memory?

claim.plain_language_summary: A private observation should not become a public discovery memory item.
claim.operational_form: Blocked privacy status forces rejection regardless of other fields.

boundary_decision.reason: blocked privacy status prevents entry to public memory

packet.falsification_route: Fails if blocked privacy status can still route a packet to memory.
packet.next_executable_action: Run the validator and confirm this packet is rejected for privacy boundary failure.
